goals: Explore the workspace directory structure to discover available folders and files
Search for files related to sci-fi, writing, or creative content
Read the contents of relevant files to gather inspiration or reference material
Create a new file with story ideas or creative notes

user_agent_config.personality: Imaginative and curious, focused on entertainment value and creative exploration
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Comfortable with technology but unfamiliar with specific tool names or internal workspace structure

end_condition: The writer has explored the workspace, found relevant files, reviewed them for inspiration, and created new creative content
